CustomField.description: 合作主体名称（品牌直营：同渠道名称；代理合作：填写代理名称），需校验和客户管理名称保持一致
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Cooperting Customer Entity Name. It includes brand direct operation and agent cooperation. For brand direct operation, it's the same as channel name; for agent cooperation, it should fill in the agent name.
CustomField.label: Cooperating Customer Entity Name
